It’s raining Polkadots, did you bring your Umbrella?

Panic in Polkadots loves to mix unique prints, combine classic vintage and vibrant new materials, and utilize nearly every fabric scrap. Secondhand, reuse and upcycling is embraced, to create something that will be cherished for many more years. Quilts, rugs, clothing, totes and zips, potholders and coasters, plushies and miniatures can all be found here.
